Based on my analysis of the molecule structure, I can now identify the neighbour atoms of atom index 7 (C:7).

## Results

**Target Atom:** Index 7, Element C (Carbon)

**Neighbour Atoms (covalently connected):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 8 | C (Carbon) |
| 6 | C (Carbon) |
| 19 | H (Hydrogen) |

**Geomconf Index:** 7127

Atom 7 (C) has 3 neighbour atoms: two carbon atoms (indices 6 and 8) forming part of the aromatic ring structure, and one hydrogen atom (index 19). The carbon at index 6 is further connected to the nitrogen atom N:5, while carbon at index 8 is connected to C:9 in the ring system.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 7, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
